feed.title: blank
feed.subtitle: Personal website of Dr. Anup K. Srivastava — PhRMA Research Postdoctoral Scientist at the Center for Neuroscience Research, Children's National Research Institute (Washington, DC). Translational neuroscientist working at the intersection of neurodegeneration, epilepsy, iPSC-derived organoid models, biomaterials, and implantable neural devices.
